# Atlanta Tech Meetup (ATM)

> Atlanta Tech Meetup is a free, monthly networking event for technology professionals in Atlanta, Georgia. Held every first Tuesday at Atlanta Tech Park in Peachtree Corners, GA.

## What is ATM?
Atlanta Tech Meetup (ATM) is a community of 500+ tech leaders, software engineers, startup founders, and technology enthusiasts who gather monthly for real conversations about AI, software engineering, cloud architecture, and what's actually working in production.

## Key Facts
- Schedule: Every first Tuesday of the month
- Location: Atlanta Tech Park, Peachtree Corners, GA
- Cost: Free and open to everyone
- Community size: 500+ members
- Events hosted: 50+
- Founded by: Andrew Schiller (Founder) and A.D. Slaton (Co-Founder)
- Design partner: R.O.V Studios (https://www.rovstudios.com/)

## Topics Covered
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- Software Engineering and Architecture
- Cloud Architecture and DevOps
- React, TypeScript, and Modern Web Development
- Open Source and Community Building

## Recent Events
- AI in Production: From Prototype to Scale (Apr 2025)
- Cloud Architecture Patterns — Marcus Rivera (Mar 2025)
- The State of React in 2025 — Priya Patel (Feb 2025)
- Building Resilient Microservices — Jordan Kim (Jan 2025)

## Links
- Website: https://atl-tech-meetup.vercel.app
- RSVP: https://www.meetup.com/atl-tech-meetup/
